q: How much money do you usually spend on shoes?
examiner_note: Nói về ngân sách. Sử dụng 'moderate amount', 'investment', 'foot health', 'budget-conscious'.

band7.text: I usually spend a moderate amount, maybe around 1 to 2 million VND for a good quality pair that I know will last me a long time. I see it more as an investment in my comfort and foot health rather than just an expense.
band7.note: Sử dụng từ vựng thực tế và giải thích lý do (moderate amount, investment).

band8.text: I’m willing to invest a bit more in footwear, as I believe quality is paramount. I typically budget between 3 to 5 million VND for a durable and stylish pair. I’d rather have one excellent set of shoes that lasts for years than multiple cheap ones that fall apart quickly.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng mạnh (paramount, durable, fall apart).

band9.text: I tend to be quite discerning with my spending on shoes. While I’m not extravagant, I prioritize long-term value and ergonomic support. I don't mind paying a premium for well-crafted pieces from reputable brands, as I consider them a vital component of my overall well-being and professional image.
band9.note: Sử dụng từ vựng ở mức độ cao (discerning, extravagant, reputable, component).

v.example: You should always buy from a reputable dealer.

advanced_vocab.example: The safety of the passengers is paramount.

similar_questions: Is it worth spending a lot of money on shoes?
Where do you usually buy your shoes?
